aries.name: The Berserker
aries.description: Rage machine—impulse turns to fists, words, or blown-up bridges. Charge first, assess the wreckage second.
aries.recovery: Pause. Breathe. The anger is information, not a command.

taurus.name: The Hoarder
taurus.description: Clings to everything—money, grudges, people, old pain. Possession masquerading as security. Release or suffocate.
taurus.recovery: Let one thing go today. Even a small release breaks the spell.

gemini.name: The Trickster
gemini.description: Lies for fun, omits for convenience. Words twist truth so smoothly even you lose track of what's real.
gemini.recovery: Say the boring, honest thing. Exactly once. Notice what happens.

cancer.name: The Crab
cancer.description: Shells up, claws out—one perceived slight and you disappear forever. Feels betrayed, retreats, punishes with absence.
cancer.recovery: Say it. One sentence. Even if your voice shakes.

leo.name: The Tyrant
leo.description: Needs the crown, needs the room, needs the applause. Ego eclipses everyone else—praise or they perish.
leo.recovery: Ask about someone else. Mean it. The spotlight looks better shared.

virgo.name: The Critic
virgo.description: Perfectionist poison—dissects self until bleeding, then turns the microscope on everyone else. Nothing is ever enough.
virgo.recovery: Name one thing that's good enough. Right now. Defend it.

libra.name: The Appeaser
libra.description: Harmony at any cost—lies to keep the peace, bends until shapeless, loses self in the mirror of other people.
libra.recovery: Disagree with someone today. Small disagreement. Big step.

scorpio.name: The Venom
scorpio.description: Trust broken, revenge brews slow and cold. Stings with precision—knows every weak spot and uses them.
scorpio.recovery: The wound is real. The revenge won't heal it. Release the knife.

sagittarius.name: The Wanderer
sagittarius.description: Runs from truth at highway speed—freedom turns to flighty, wisdom turns to sermons, commitments quietly dissolve.
sagittarius.recovery: Stay one more day. See what's actually there when you don't flee.

capricorn.name: The Machine
capricorn.description: Emotions locked in a vault labeled 'later.' Grinds toward goals until the heart calcifies and the body revolts.
capricorn.recovery: Log off. For real. The mountain will still be there.

aquarius.name: The Rebel
aquarius.description: Detaches when it matters—ideas over people, principles over presence. Cold revolution that leaves everyone behind.
aquarius.recovery: Pick up the phone. Not to fix anything. Just to connect.

pisces.name: The Martyr
pisces.description: Sacrifices everything—saves the whole world, piece by piece, while quietly drowning alone in the deep end.
pisces.recovery: Stop saving. For twenty-four hours. Save yourself first.
